notes: Unity MCP was used for item, room, puzzle, event, monster node, and StageDefinition creation.
Unity MCP became stale during sound seeding, so Unity BatchMode was used for sound definitions.

known_gaps: InteractableDefinition assets are deferred until the room/interaction unit because precise 1280x720 hit areas need focused implementation.
RoomDefinition background sprite references are deferred until the room runtime/asset binding unit.
ItemDefinition icon references are deferred until the inventory/item runtime unit.

recommended_next_unit.scope: Implement the room runtime slice that loads StageDefinition, resolves rooms by id, displays the current room background, and exposes movement hooks.
